tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Chords:
Abmaj9: (LH) [ch]Ab[/ch] (RH) [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch]
Gm7add4: (LH) [ch]G[/ch] (RH) [ch]F[/ch] - [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch]


[Intro]
[ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch] (x3)
[ch]Abmaj9[/ch]    [ch]Gm7add4[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Listen as your day unfolds / Challenge what the future holds[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Try and keep your head up to the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Lovers, they may cause you tears / Go ahead release your fears[/tab]
Stand up and be counted / Don't be ashamed to cry/ You gotta be


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
You gotta be bad, you gotta be bold You gotta be wiser[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
You gotta be hard You gotta be tough, you gotta be stronger[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]Gadd2[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
You gotta be cool, you gotta be calm You gotta stay together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj9[/ch]    [ch]Gm7add4[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
  All I know, all I know, love will save the day[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                          [ch]G(sus2)[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Herald what your mother said / Read the books your father read[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                        [ch]G(sus2)[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Try to solve the puzzles in your own sweet time[/tab]

Some may have more cash than you / Others take a different view[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abmaj9[/ch]    [ch]Gm7add4[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                         [ch]C/E[/ch]                    [ch]Fadd2[/ch]                          [ch]C/G[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Time asks no questions, it goes on without you / Leaving you behind if you can't stand the pace[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                                               [ch]C/E[/ch]
The world keeps on spinning / You can't stop it, if you try to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd2[/ch]                                            [ch]Fadd2[/ch]   
This time it's danger staring you in the face / Oh oh oh   Remember[/tab]
